assertions.title: Daemon-event cross-area flow is executable with authenticated test context

steps.action: Execute daemon-event route tests with the new test-auth seam
steps.expected: Test-context daemon auth is accepted in non-production, invalid/production paths are rejected, and no X-Daemon-Token bypass is allowed
steps.observed: Route tests passed with explicit coverage for valid test-auth, invalid secret rejection, production rejection, and token precedence rejection.

steps.action: Execute terminal daemon-event path under test auth and assert delivery-loop broadcast
steps.expected: Terminal v2 daemon-event should process and publish refetch:["delivery-loop"]
steps.observed: Test `allows terminal daemon-event via test auth and publishes delivery-loop refetch broadcast` passed and asserted broadcast payload includes `op: "refetch"` and `refetch: ["delivery-loop"]`.

commands: pnpm -C apps/www exec vitest run src/app/api/daemon-event/route.test.ts

summary: VAL-CROSS-001 is now executable and passing for daemon-integration validation: authenticated test-context daemon-event ingress can run terminal v2 flow and emit delivery-loop refetch broadcast without weakening production auth.
